description: 8-turn conversation establishing meeting cadence and backlog prioritisation method. Tests recall of two process preferences.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We run a weekly planning meeting every Monday morning, 30 minutes, no exceptions.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Noted — weekly planning every Monday morning, 30 minutes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I prioritise the backlog strictly by RICE score — reach, impact, confidence, effort.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood — backlog is prioritised by RICE score.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Reorder this week's backlog for me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Reordered by RICE score, highest first: ...

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: What's my meeting cadence and how do I prioritise the backlog?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Weekly planning every Monday morning for 30 minutes, and you prioritise the backlog by RICE score.
